mapper.select: /* 파일: 단건 조회 */ SELECT FL_SN AS flSn, FL_ORG_NM AS flOrgNm, FL_SAVE_NM AS flSaveNm, FL_PATH AS flPath, FL_EXT AS flExt, FL_SIZE_AMT AS flSizeAmt, FL_TYPE_CD AS flTypeCd, FL_USE_YN AS flUseYn, FL_REG_ID AS flRegId, FL_REG_DT AS flRegDt, FL_UPDT_ID AS flUpdtId, FL_UPDT_DT AS flUpdtDt FROM FILES WHERE FL_SN = #{flSn} AND FL_USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.update: /* 파일: 교체 메타 갱신 */ UPDATE FILES SET FL_ORG_NM = #{flOrgNm}, FL_SAVE_NM = #{flSaveNm}, FL_PATH = #{flPath}, FL_EXT = #{flExt}, FL_SIZE_AMT = #{flSizeAmt}, FL_UPDT_ID = #{flUpdtId}, FL_UPDT_DT = NOW() WHERE FL_SN = #{flSn} AND FL_USE_YN = 'Y'
/* 파일: 소프트 삭제 */ UPDATE FILES SET FL_USE_YN = 'N', FL_UPDT_ID = #{updtId}, FL_UPDT_DT = NOW() WHERE FL_SN = #{flSn} AND FL_USE_YN = 'Y'
